ddls:
CREATE TABLE "filter_models" (
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter model */,
  "filter_class" TEXT /* Class of the filter (e.g., M5, M6) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter model was first produced */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the filter model in months */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the filter construction */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the filter */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the filter in kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_classes" (
  "filter_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter class */,
  "filter_class" TEXT /* Name of the filter class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter class */,
  "min_efficiency" REAL /* Minimum efficiency of the filter class */,
  "max_efficiency" REAL /* Maximum efficiency of the filter class */,
  "recommended_use" TEXT /* Recommended use cases for the filter class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension */,
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter model */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the filter in mm */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the filter in mm */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the filter in mm */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the filter in cubic meters */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the filter in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_dimensions_filter_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_model_id") REFERENCES filter_models ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter model */,
  "nominal_airflow" REAL /* Nominal airflow of the filter in m³/h */,
  "initial_pressure_drop" REAL /* Initial pressure drop of the filter in Pa */,
  "final_pressure_drop" REAL /* Final pressure drop of the filter in Pa */,
  "maximum_airflow" REAL /* Maximum airflow of the filter in m³/h */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_performance_filter_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_model_id") REFERENCES filter_models ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pocket_numbers" (
  "pocket_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pocket number */,
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter model */,
  "pocket_number" INTEGER /* Number of pockets in the filter */,
  "pocket_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the pockets (e.g., rectangular, triangular) */,
  "pocket_material" TEXT /* Material used for the pockets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pocket_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pocket_numbers_filter_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_model_id") REFERENCES filter_models ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filtration_areas" (
  "filtration_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filtration area */,
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter model */,
  "filtration_area" REAL /* Filtration area of the filter in m² */,
  "effective_filtration_area" REAL /* Effective filtration area in m² */,
  "filtration_media" TEXT /* Material used for filtration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filtration_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filtration_areas_filter_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_model_id") REFERENCES filter_models ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data */,
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter model */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "pressure_drop" REAL /* Pressure drop measured during the test in Pa */,
  "airflow" REAL /* Airflow measured during the test in m³/h */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_filter_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_model_id") REFERENCES filter_models ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "filter_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter model */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation the certification complies with */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Body that issued the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_filter_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_model_id") REFERENCES filter_models ("filter_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
